intended_use: SMART PCFD software includes AI-powered algorithms and is intended to be used to support orthopedic healthcare professionals in the diagnosis and surgical planning of Progressive Collapsing Foot Defor
intended_use_full: SMART PCFD software includes AI-powered algorithms and is intended to be used to support orthopedic healthcare professionals in the diagnosis and surgical planning of Progressive Collapsing Foot Deformity (PCFD) in a hospital or clinic environment. The medical image modality intended to be used in the software is weight-bearing CT (WBCT).
ground_truth: Ground truth independently established by three U.S. orthopedic surgeons using 3rd party software; each clinician reviewed DICOM series through axial/sagittal/coronal views and/or 3D reconstruction; majority vote of three (two same responses required) established ground truth.
other_metrics: Metal identification: 98.8% correct identification (sensitivity 100%, specificity 98%); Surgical planning measurements: ±1 degree for angular measurements and ±1.0 mm for distance measurements
